feature: Rich CLI Chat TUI — Polish (markdown, flowing layout, multi-line input)
description: Elevates `hex chat` from functional to rich REPL-like experience: flowing conversation layout (no bordered message panel), markdown rendering via pulldown-cmark (code blocks, bold, inline code, lists), multi-line input (Shift+Enter), and improved visual hierarchy with distinct role labels.

phases.name: Add pulldown-cmark dep + markdown renderer module
phases.description: Add pulldown-cmark to hex-cli/Cargo.toml and create hex-cli/src/tui/markdown.rs with a function that converts a markdown string into ratatui Lines with styled Spans.

tasks.name: Add pulldown-cmark + create tui/markdown.rs renderer
tasks.description:
In hex-cli/Cargo.toml add: `pulldown-cmark = "0.12"`. Then create hex-cli/src/tui/markdown.rs with:

```rust
use pulldown_cmark::{Event, Options, Parser, Tag, TagEnd, CodeBlockKind};
use ratatui::prelude::*;
use ratatui::widgets::Wrap;

/// Convert a markdown string to a Vec<Line<'static>> suitable for ratatui Paragraph.
/// Handles: **bold**, *italic*, `inline code`, ```code blocks```, # headings, - bullet lists.
pub fn render_markdown(text: &str, _width: u16) -> Vec<Line<'static>> { ... }
```

Implementation approach:
- Walk pulldown_cmark events with Options::ENABLE_STRIKETHROUGH | ENABLE_TASKLISTS
- Track state: inside_code_block (bool), code_lang (String), current_line (Vec<Span>), in_list (bool)
- Tag::Strong → push spans with Modifier::BOLD
- Tag::Emphasis → push spans with Modifier::ITALIC
- Tag::Code (inline) → push span with fg(Color::LightGreen)
- Tag::CodeBlock → set inside_code_block=true, store lang from CodeBlockKind::Fenced
- Text inside code block → push span with fg(Color::White) bg(Color::Rgb(40,40,40)), prepend '│ ' left gutter
- Before first code line push a header line: Span::styled(format!(" ╭─ {} ", lang), cyan dim) + ─ fill
- After last code line push: Span::styled(" ╰─", cyan dim) + ─ fill
- Tag::Item (list item) → prepend '  • ' glyph
- Tag::Heading(level) → use BOLD + size-dependent prefix (# ## ###)
- SoftBreak/HardBreak → push current_line to result, start new line
- Event::End(TagEnd::Paragraph) → push current_line, push empty Line

Register in tui/mod.rs: add `pub mod markdown;`

Run `cargo check -p hex-cli` to confirm. Commit: `git add hex-cli/Cargo.toml hex-cli/src/tui/markdown.rs hex-cli/src/tui/mod.rs && git commit -m 'feat(hex-cli/tui): add markdown renderer (pulldown-cmark)'`

phases.name: Redesign tui/chat.rs — flowing layout, markdown, multi-line input
phases.description: Rewrite the render functions and input handling in tui/chat.rs to produce a flowing REPL-like conversation instead of a bordered panel app.

tasks.name: Redesign render_messages, render_input, and key handling in tui/chat.rs

phases.name: Integration build + release binary update
phases.description: Full release build and smoke test to confirm the rich TUI compiles and deploys correctly.

tasks.name: Release build + smoke test hex chat --no-tui
tasks.description: Run `cargo build -p hex-cli --release`. Run `hex chat --no-tui --message 'say ok'` to verify --no-tui still works. Fix any compile issues. Final commit: `git add -u && git commit -m 'feat(cli-chat-tui-polish): rich REPL layout complete'`
